reviews.review_description:
I loaded in and was quite happy I like the way the art style is kinda retro vr games don’t get creative like that a lot anymore, the store was great and had a few things to get, besides a few bugs and glitches the horror and jumpscared were pretty good the puzzles weren’t so hard to do and were acctualy kinda enjoyable. I truly think this game can go far 

I reviewed this game for a yt video check it out at @coco3brits in a few days when it’s released. I would love to get the content creator badge for playing sooo yk lemme know if I get it
I really enjoyed this master piece
